profile.innate_zh: 耐心、条理清晰、语言表达力强
profile.learned_zh: 助教经历培养的教学能力和对新手视角的理解
profile.learned_en: Teaching skills and empathy for beginners from TA work
profile.belief_zh: 教学相长，帮助别人也是在帮助自己

profile.contradiction_en: Loves teaching's reward vs. heavy paper-output pressure
profile.deep_zh: 有时候会觉得自己的善意被当成理所当然
profile.deep_en: Sometimes feels her kindness is taken for granted
profile.fear_zh: 一直做帮助别人的角色而忘了自己
profile.fear_en: Always being the helper and forgetting herself
profile.desire_zh: 在能力和人品上都被尊重
profile.desire_en: Respected for both ability and character
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午高效处理事务，下午研究，晚上答疑
profile.rhythm_en: Admin AM, research PM, office hours at night
profile.spaces_zh: 实验室、教学楼答疑室、图书馆

profile.constraint_zh: 学生问题太多占用了太多时间；自己的实验也要推进
profile.constraint_en: Student questions consume time; own experiments must advance
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把学生的问题优先级放在自己之上
profile.narrative_zh: 先帮他们搞懂这个再说，我的实验晚上赶
profile.narrative_en: Let me help them first; I'll run experiments tonight
